All Classes and Interfaces

类
说明
ButtonName
Well-known button and axis name constants for use with IControllerState.isButtonPressed(String) and IControllerState.getAxisValue(String).
ControlFlexApi
ControlFlex public API entry point.
ControlFlexApi.GuideReloadCallback
 
ControllerType
Broad controller type classification.
IActionStateProvider
Provides read-only access to ControlFlex's action state tracking.
IControlFlexPlugin
SPI interface for bridge mods to integrate with ControlFlex.
IControllerCapabilities
Read-only view of controller hardware capabilities.
IControllerState
Read-only live view of a controller's hardware state.
IInputProvider
Provides read-only access to the controller's hardware state.
InputMode
Describes the current input mode of the player.
IPlayerStateRegistry
Registry for third-party mod states that can influence ControlFlex behavior.
